easy.title: EGFR-Mutated Metastatic NSCLC Eligibility
easy.instructions: Review the structured oncology chart and determine whether the patient meets the five binary eligibility criteria for a first-line EGFR inhibitor trial. Use extract_data for clinical facts and submit_decision with eligible or ineligible.

patient.diagnosis: Stage IV lung adenocarcinoma with pleural metastases
patient.molecular_profile: EGFR L858R positive; ALK negative; ROS1 negative
patient.prior_therapy: Carboplatin/pemetrexed deferred; no prior EGFR TKI exposure

medium.title: Rank Patients for HER2-Positive Breast Cancer Trial
medium.instructions: Rank the three candidates from best to worst fit for a second-line HER2-positive metastatic breast cancer antibody-drug conjugate trial. Extract key biomarkers or performance status if useful, then submit the full ranking with rank_patients.

fit_score_drivers: Prior trastuzumab and taxane exposure required

patients.brain_mri: Stable treated cerebellar lesion; no active CNS progression

patients.prior_therapy: Taxane and trastuzumab completed; pertuzumab intolerant

patients.brain_mri: New enhancing frontal lesion on last scan

hard.title: Protocol Deviations in AML Screening Note
hard.instructions: Read the unstructured hematology note, identify protocol deviations or exclusions, and determine if the patient is screen-failed. Use extract_data for critical facts, flag_deviation for protocol violations, then submit_decision with eligible or ineligible.

context.screening_note: Mr. J.R. is a 63-year-old man with relapsed AML harboring FLT3-ITD. He presented overnight with neutropenic fever and positive blood cultures. ECG today showed QTc 486 ms. Posaconazole prophylaxis was restarted five days ago because of prior pulmonary aspergillosis. Bone marrow confirms persistent 22% blasts. ECOG 1. Creatinine clearance 68 mL/min.
